questions.question: Ek office administrator ka mukhya kaam kya hota hai?

options.A: Office ke daily operations ko smoothly chalana
options.B: Sirf chai-coffee banana

questions.explanation: Office administrator ka primary role office ke din-pratidin ke kaamo ko manage karna hota hai, jaise ki scheduling, record keeping, aur communication.

questions.question: Professional communication me 'Clarity' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Apni baat saaf aur aasan shabdo me kehna
options.C: Bahut kathin shabdo ka istemal karna

questions.explanation: Clarity ka matlab hai ki aapka message sunne wale ya padhne wale ko aasani se samajh aa jaye, bina kisi confusion ke.

questions.question: Non-verbal communication ka ek example kya hai?

options.B: Phone par baat karna
options.C: Body language jaise eye contact banana

questions.explanation: Non-verbal communication me shabdo ka istemal nahi hota. Isme body language, gestures, aur facial expressions shamil hote hain.

questions.question: Ek 'Memo' (Memorandum) aam taur par kiske liye istemal hota hai?

options.B: Office ke andar internal communication ke liye

questions.explanation: Memo ek short, official note hota hai jo ek hi organization ke employees ke beech information share karne ke liye use hota hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko apne senior se kisi baat par asahmati (disagreement) hai, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Sabke samne unse behas karni chahiye
options.B: Chup rehna chahiye aur kuch nahi bolna chahiye
options.C: Akele me, shanti se aur respectfully apna point of view rakhna chahiye
options.D: Unki complaint HR se karni chahiye

questions.explanation: Professional tarika yeh hai ki aap private me, samman ke saath apna nazariya pesh karein, na ki public me conflict create karein.

questions.question: Communication me 'Active Listening' ka kya arth hai?

options.A: Sirf sunna aur koi response na dena
options.B: Sunne ke saath-saath, samjhna, response dena aur yaad rakhna
options.C: Baat karte samay phone use karna
options.D: Baat kaat kar apni baat kehna

questions.explanation: Active listening ka matlab hai puri tarah se concentrate karna, samjhna, response dena aur jo kaha gaya hai use yaad rakhna.

questions.question: Ek formal business letter ke अंत में kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Ek professional closing jaise 'Sincerely' ya 'Regards', fir aapka naam aur signature

questions.explanation: Formal letters hamesha ek professional closing, signature, aur typed name ke saath end hote hain.

questions.question: Office me 'hierarchy' ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.A: Sabhi employees ka ek jaisa level
options.B: Office ka address
options.C: Authority aur responsibility ka structure (jaise Junior, Senior, Manager)

questions.explanation: Hierarchy ek system hai jisme organization ke members ko unke rank ya authority ke hisab se arrange kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Aapko ek urgent message apne manager ko dena hai, lekin woh meeting me hain. Aap kya karenge?

options.A: Meeting room me jaakar zor se chillayenge
options.B: Meeting khatm hone ka intezar karenge, chahe kitni bhi der lage
options.C: Ek chhota, saaf note likhkar meeting room ke bahar kisi ko de denge ya unke desk par rakh denge

questions.explanation: Yeh tarika professional hai. Isse manager disturb bhi nahi honge aur un tak urgent message bhi pahunch jayega.

questions.question: Written communication (likhit sanchaar) ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Isme koi kharcha nahi hota
options.C: Yeh ek permanent record ban jata hai jise future me refer kar sakte hain
options.D: Isme emotions dikhana aasan hota hai

questions.explanation: Written communication ka sabse bada fayda yeh hai ki yeh ek permanent record provide karta hai, jisse misunderstandings kam hoti hain.

questions.question: Inme se kaun sa ek 'communication barrier' (sanchaar me badha) hai?

options.B: Aas-paas ka shor (Noise)

questions.explanation: Shor ek physical barrier hai jo message ko theek se sunne ya samajhne se rokta hai.

questions.question: Agar aapko ek naye colleague ko office policy samjhani hai, to aapka tone kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Helpful, patient aur friendly

questions.explanation: Naye colleague ki help karte samay hamesha friendly aur patient rehna chahiye taaki woh comfortable feel kare aur cheezein aasaani se samajh sake.

questions.question: 'Minutes of Meeting' (MOM) kya hota hai?

options.A: Meeting kitne minute chali, uska hisab
options.B: Meeting me kya-kya discuss hua aur kya decisions liye gaye, uska written record
options.C: Meeting me kaun late aaya, uski list

questions.explanation: MOM ek official document hota hai jisme meeting ke key points, discussions, decisions aur action items ko record kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Aapko ek presentation ke dauran audience se ek aisa sawal pucha gaya jiska jawab aapko nahi pata. Aapki sabse best response kya hogi?

options.B: Sawal ko ignore kar dena
options.C: Imandari se kehna ki aapko iska jawab abhi nahi pata, lekin aap pata karke unhe jald batayenge
options.D: Sawal puchne wale par gussa karna

questions.explanation: Yeh imandari aur professionalism dikhata hai. Galat information dene se behtar hai ki aap sahi information pata karke dene ka wada karein.

questions.question: Feedback dete samay 'Constructive Criticism' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Kisi ki beizzati karna
options.C: Galtiyan batane ke saath-saath sudhar (improvement) ke liye suggestions bhi dena
options.D: Kisi ki bhi galti par dhyan na dena

questions.explanation: Constructive criticism ka maksad kisi ko neecha dikhana nahi, balki unhe unki kami batakar behtar banne me madad karna hota hai.

questions.question: Office me 'grapevine communication' kise kehte hain?

options.B: CEO dwara ki gayi announcement
options.C: Informal aur unofficial communication, jaise ki gossip ya afwah
options.D: Notice board par likha gaya message

questions.explanation: Grapevine ek informal communication network hai jiske through afwahein aur unofficial information tezi se failti hai.

questions.question: Business communication me 'conciseness' ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Message ko bahut lamba aur detailed banana
options.B: Kam se kam shabdo me apni baat saaf-saaf kehna
options.C: Bahut saare technical jargons ka istemal karna

questions.explanation: Conciseness ka matlab hai to-the-point baat karna. Isse samay bachta hai aur message aasani se samajh aata hai.

questions.question: Office me documents ko aasan pahunch ke liye vyavasthit (organize) karne ki prakriya ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Filing

questions.explanation: Filing ek process hai jisme documents ko ek systematic tarike se store kiya jaata hai taaki unhe zaroorat padne par aasani se dhunda ja sake.

questions.question: Alphabetical filing system me, 'John Smith' ki file 'James Peterson' ki file ke _______ aayegi.

options.B: Pehle (before)

questions.explanation: Alphabetical system me, files ko naam ke pehle akshar ke anusaar A-Z order me rakha jaata hai. 'Smith' 'Peterson' ke baad aata hai.

questions.question: Data entry karte samay sabse important cheez kya hai?

options.B: Accuracy (Satikta)

questions.explanation: Data entry me speed zaroori hai, lekin sabse zyada zaroori accuracy hai. Galat data enter karne se poora record kharab ho sakta hai.

questions.question: 'Confidential' documents ke saath kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unhe khuli jagah par chhod dena chahiye
options.B: Unhe lock aur key me ya password-protected digital folder me rakhna chahiye
options.C: Unki photo kheench kar social media par daal deni chahiye
options.D: Unhe kisi bhi colleague ke saath share karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Confidential ya gopniya dastavezo ko hamesha surakshit jagah par rakhna chahiye jahan anadhikrit (unauthorized) logon ki pahunch na ho.

questions.question: Numerical filing system me documents ko kaise arrange kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Date ke hisab se

questions.explanation: Numerical filing system me har file ko ek unique number diya jaata hai aur unhe us number ke badhte hue kram (ascending order) me rakha jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek document ko uski original jagah se hatane par uski jagah par kya rakha jaata hai?

options.B: Ek 'Out-guide' ya 'Out-folder'

questions.explanation: Out-guide ek marker hota hai jo batata hai ki file kahan hai, kisne li hai, aur kab li hai. Isse file ko track karna aasan hota hai.

questions.question: Digital files ko organize karne ke liye kya banana sabse accha tarika hai?

options.A: Sabhi files ko desktop par save karna
options.B: Logical folders aur sub-folders banana
options.C: Sabhi files ko ek hi folder me daal dena

questions.explanation: Computer me files ko alag-alag folders aur sub-folders (jaise 'Invoices' -> '2023' -> 'January') me rakhne se unhe dhundhna aasan ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Purane aur anavashyak (unnecessary) documents ko nasht (destroy) karne ki prakriya ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Scanning

questions.explanation: Jab documents ki zaroorat nahi rehti, khas kar confidential documents, to unhe shred karke nasht kar diya jaata hai taaki unka galat istemal na ho.

questions.question: Geographical filing system kin businesses ke liye sabse zyada upyogi hai?

options.A: Jinke customers alag-alag shehron ya deshon me hain
options.B: Jinka sirf ek hi office hai

questions.explanation: Geographical system me files ko location (jaise state, city) ke hisab se organize kiya jaata hai. Yeh un companies ke liye faydemand hai jinka business alag-alag jagahon par faila hua hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Invoice' kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek payment ka proof
options.C: Beche gaye saaman ya service aur uski keemat ka ek detailed bill

questions.explanation: Invoice ek commercial document hai jo seller dwara buyer ko issue kiya jaata hai. Isme transaction ki details hoti hain aur payment request ki jaati hai.

questions.question: Record management ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Zaroori information ko sahi samay par, sahi vyakti tak pahunchana

questions.explanation: Effective record management yeh sunishchit karta hai ki important information surakshit, organized aur zaroorat padne par aasani se uplabdh ho.

questions.question: 'Cross-referencing' in filing ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek file ko do jagah par rakhna
options.B: Ek note daalna jo bataye ki related information kisi aur file me mil sakti hai
options.C: File par cross ka nishan banana

questions.explanation: Cross-referencing tab use hota hai jab ek document ek se zyada topic se related ho. Isse user ko sabhi related documents dhundhne me madad milti hai.

questions.question: Physical documents ko digital format me convert karne ke liye kis device ka istemal hota hai?

options.B: Scanner

questions.explanation: Scanner ek device hai jo paper documents ko scan karke unhe computer me digital image (jaise PDF ya JPEG) ke roop me save karta hai.

questions.question: Ek document retention policy kya nirdharit karti hai?

options.A: Document ko kis color ki file me rakhna hai
options.B: Document ko kitne samay tak office me rakha jaana chahiye aur kab nasht karna hai
options.D: Document ko A4 size paper par print karna hai

questions.explanation: Retention policy ek niyam hai jo batata hai ki legal aur business requirements ke hisab se alag-alag tarah ke records ko kitne time tak sambhal kar rakhna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Incoming mail (aane wali daak) ko handle karne ka pehla step kya hai?

options.A: Usey seedha dustbin me daal dena
options.B: Usey sort karna (jaise urgent, normal, personal)

questions.explanation: Sabse pehle aayi hui mail ko uski priority aur type ke hisab se sort karna chahiye taaki zaroori mail par pehle dhyan diya ja sake.

questions.question: Aapko 500 business cards ko organize karna hai. Sabse accha filing method kya hoga?

options.A: Ek box me sabko ek saath daal dena
options.B: Unhe rubber band se baandh dena
options.C: Alphabetically (company ya vyakti ke naam se) ek card file box me lagana
options.D: Har card ko alag-alag file me rakhna

questions.explanation: Business cards ko alphabetically organize karna sabse prabhavi tarika hai, jisse kisi specific contact ko dhundhna bahut aasan ho jaata hai.

questions.question: 'Archiving' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Purane lekin important documents ko long-term storage me bhejna

questions.explanation: Archiving me un documents ko jo ab active use me nahi hain, lekin future reference ke liye important ho sakte hain, unhe ek surakshit jagah par store kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: MS Word me text ko copy karne ke liye kaun sa shortcut key use hota hai?

options.B: Ctrl + V

questions.explanation: Ctrl + C ka istemal selected text ya object ko clipboard par copy karne ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: MS Excel me ek file ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Presentation

questions.explanation: MS Excel ki file ko Workbook kehte hain, aur uske andar alag-alag sheets ko Worksheet kehte hain.

questions.question: Aapko 10 logon ko ek email bhejna hai, lekin aap nahi chahte ki koi ek dusre ka email address dekh sake. Aap unke email addresses ko kis field me daalenge?

options.B: CC (Carbon Copy)

questions.explanation: BCC me daale gaye recipients ek dusre ke email address nahi dekh paate, jisse privacy bani rehti hai.

questions.question: MS PowerPoint ka mukhya upyog kya hai?

options.B: Calculations karne ke liye

questions.explanation: MS PowerPoint ek software hai jiska istemal slides ke roop me visual presentations banane ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek document ko print karne ke liye shortcut key kya hai?

options.B: Ctrl + O

questions.explanation: Ctrl + P dabane se print dialog box khulta hai jahan se aap document ko print kar sakte hain.

questions.question: MS Excel me cells (A1, A2, A3) ke numbers ko jodne (sum) ke liye kaun sa formula sahi hai?

options.B: =TOTAL(A1:A3)

questions.explanation: Excel me SUM() function ka istemal ek range of cells me diye gaye numbers ko jodne ke liye kiya jaata hai. =A1+A2+A3 bhi sahi hai, lekin SUM function lambi ranges ke liye zyada efficient hai.

questions.question: Ek professional email me 'Subject' line कैसी होनी chahiye?

options.B: Bahut lambi aur confusing
options.C: Chhoti, saaf aur email ke content se related

questions.explanation: Ek acchi subject line se receiver ko email khole bina hi pata chal jaata hai ki email kis baare me hai, jisse unka samay bachta hai.

questions.question: CPU ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Computer Processing Unit

questions.explanation: CPU ko computer ka 'brain' bhi kaha jaata hai, jo sabhi instructions aur calculations ko process karta hai.

questions.question: MS Word me 'Mail Merge' feature ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Ek hi letter ko alag-alag logon ke naam aur address ke saath personalize karke bhejna

questions.explanation: Mail Merge ka istemal bulk letters, labels ya envelopes banane ke liye hota hai, jahan basic content same rehta hai lekin recipient ki details (jaise naam, address) badalti rehti hai.

questions.question: Agar aapka printer print nahi kar raha hai, to sabse pehla step kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Computer ko restart karna
options.C: Check karna ki printer ON hai aur computer se theek se connect hai ya nahi
options.D: Ink cartridge ko nikal kar fek dena

questions.explanation: Troubleshooting ka pehla rule hai basic checks karna. Aksar problem power cable ya USB cable ke loose hone jaisi chhoti cheezon se hoti hai.

questions.question: Internet par jaankari search karne ke liye aap kiska istemal karte hain?

options.B: Calculator

questions.explanation: Search engines web applications hain jo internet par available information ko keywords ke basis par search karne me madad karte hain.

questions.question: MS Excel me, ek column aur ek row ke intersection ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Cell

questions.explanation: Worksheet chhote-chhote boxes se bani hoti hai jinhe 'Cell' kehte hain. Har cell ka ek unique address hota hai, jaise A1, B2.

questions.question: Email me attach ki gayi file ko download karne ke liye aapko kya karna hoga?

options.B: Attachment icon (paperclip jaisa) par click karna hoga

questions.explanation: Attachments email ke saath bheji gayi files hoti hain. Unhe apne computer me save karne ke liye unpar click karke download karna padta hai.

questions.question: MS Word me text ko 'Bold' karne ka shortcut kya hai?

options.B: Ctrl + U

questions.explanation: Ctrl + B shortcut ka istemal selected text ko mota (Bold) karne ke liye hota hai, taaki woh alag se highlight ho.

questions.question: Ek spreadsheet software ka mukhya kaam kya hai?

options.B: Data ko rows aur columns me organize, analyze aur calculate karna

questions.explanation: Spreadsheet software jaise MS Excel ka istemal data ko tabular format me manage karne, calculations karne aur charts banane ke liye hota hai.

questions.question: Video conference ke liye aapko kya-kya chahiye?

options.B: Ek computer, internet connection, webcam, aur microphone

questions.explanation: Video conferencing me live video aur audio ke zariye communication hota hai, jiske liye in sabhi devices ki zaroorat padti hai.

questions.question: MS Excel me 'VLOOKUP' function ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Ek table me vertical (column-wise) data search karke uske corresponding value nikalne ke liye
options.D: Text ka color badalne ke liye

questions.explanation: VLOOKUP ek powerful function hai jo ek table ke pehle column me ek value ko dhundhta hai aur usi row me kisi dusre column se value return karta hai.

questions.question: Aapko apne computer ko virus se bachane ke liye kya install karna chahiye?

options.B: Antivirus software

questions.explanation: Antivirus software computer ko malware, viruses, aur anya khatron se surakshit rakhta hai.

questions.question: Cloud storage (jaise Google Drive, Dropbox) ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Files sirf aapke computer par save rehti hain
options.B: Aap apni files ko internet ke zariye kahin se bhi access kar sakte hain
options.C: Iske liye internet ki zaroorat nahi hoti

questions.explanation: Cloud storage aapki files ko remote servers par store karta hai, jisse aap unhe kisi bhi device se internet ke through access, edit aur share kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Ek 'phishing' email kya hota hai?

options.A: Machli pakadne ke baare me email
options.B: Ek genuine company se aaya hua promotional email
options.C: Ek dhokha-dhadi wala email jo aapse aapki personal information (jaise password, bank details) maangta hai
options.D: Ek email jisme bahut saari pictures ho

questions.explanation: Phishing ek cyber attack hai jisme attacker ek vishwasniya sanstha hone ka dikhawa karke aapse aapki sensitive jaankari hasil karne ki koshish karta hai.

questions.question: MS PowerPoint me, sabhi slides par ek jaisa design (logo, font, color) apply karne ke liye kis feature ka istemal karna chahiye?

options.A: Har slide ko alag-alag design karna
options.B: Slide Master

questions.explanation: Slide Master ek master template ki tarah kaam karta hai. Isme kiye gaye badlav aapki presentation ki sabhi slides par automatically apply ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Office me aane wale visitor ko greet karte samay aapka attitude kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Polite, friendly aur professional

questions.explanation: Visitor company ka pehla impression reception se hi leta hai. Isliye unhe hamesha ek positive aur professional tarike se greet karna chahiye.

questions.question: Professional tarike se phone uthane ka sahi tareeka kya hai?

options.B: Ek acchi greeting ke saath company ka naam aur fir apna naam batana (Jaise: Good morning, ABC Company, Priya speaking)

questions.explanation: Yeh ek professional phone etiquette hai. Isse caller ko pata chalta hai ki usne sahi jagah call kiya hai aur woh kisse baat kar raha hai.

questions.question: Agar koi visitor aapse milne aaya hai jiska appointment nahi hai, to aap kya karenge?

options.B: Usey politely batayenge ki appointment zaroori hai aur check karenge ki jis se woh milna chahte hain woh free hain ya nahi
options.D: Usey security guard se bahar nikalwa denge

questions.explanation: Ek professional approach me visitor ko politely handle karna aur unki request ko संबंधित व्यक्ति tak pahunchana shamil hai.

questions.question: Ek caller ko hold par rakhne se pehle kya karna zaroori hai?

options.A: Bina bataye hold par daal dena
options.B: Unse hold par rakhne ki permission lena aur wajah batana

questions.explanation: Hamesha caller se anumati leni chahiye aur batana chahiye ki aap unhe hold par kyu rakh rahe hain. Yeh acchi customer service ka hissa hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Visitor Log Book' maintain karne ka kya purpose hai?

options.A: Yeh ek bekar ka kaam hai
options.B: Office ki security ke liye, yeh record rakhne ke liye ki kaun, kab aur kisse milne aaya
options.C: Visitors ke phone number lene ke liye

questions.explanation: Visitor log book security aur safety ke liye bahut zaroori hai. Emergency ki sthiti me yeh pata lagane me madad karta hai ki building me kitne visitors hain.

questions.question: Agar ek customer phone par gusse me hai, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Phone kaat dena
options.C: Shaant rehna, unki baat dhyaan se sunna aur unhe samjhane ki koshish karna
options.D: Unhe hold par daal kar bhool jaana

questions.explanation: Gusse wale customer ko handle karne ka sabse accha tarika hai shaant rehna aur empathy dikhana. Unki problem ko samjhe aur solution dene ki koshish karein.

questions.question: Phone par message lete samay kaun si information lena sabse zaroori hai?

options.A: Caller ka naam, contact number, message, aur call ka time/date
options.B: Sirf caller ka naam

questions.explanation: Ek complete message me yeh saari jaankari honi chahiye taaki jis व्यक्ति ke liye message hai, woh aasani se samajh sake aur wapas contact kar sake.

questions.question: Reception area ko kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Saaf-suthra, વ્યવસ્થિત (well-organized) aur aakarshak (welcoming)
options.D: Bahut saare personal saaman se bhara hua

questions.explanation: Reception area company ka chehra hota hai. Ek saaf aur organized reception area visitors par accha prabhav daalta hai.

questions.question: Ek se zyada phone lines ko handle karne wale system ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: EPABX/Multi-line phone system

questions.explanation: EPABX (Electronic Private Automatic Branch Exchange) system ek office me multiple phone lines ko manage karne aur calls ko transfer karne ki suvidha deta hai.

questions.question: Aapke paas ek hi samay me ek visitor khada hai aur phone bhi baj raha hai. Aap pehle kise attend karenge?

options.B: Visitor ko ignore kar denge
options.C: Visitor se ek second ka samay maang kar, phone uthakar caller ko hold par rakhne ki request karenge

questions.explanation: Yeh tarika dono ko acknowledge karta hai. Aap visitor ko importance dete hain aur caller ko bhi an-suna nahi karte. Yeh multitasking aur priority management ka accha example hai.

questions.question: Customer service me 'empathy' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Customer ke liye bura feel karna
options.B: Customer ki situation ko unke point of view se samjhne ki koshish karna
options.C: Customer ki har baat se agree karna

questions.explanation: Empathy ka matlab hai khud ko customer ki jagah par rakh kar unki samasya aur bhavnao ko samajhna.

questions.question: Jab aap kisi ki call transfer kar rahe ho, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Call ko seedha transfer kar dena
options.B: Pehle jis व्यक्ति ko call transfer karni hai, use batana ki kaun call par hai aur kis baare me hai, fir transfer karna
options.C: Caller ko bolna ki woh dobara call kare

questions.explanation: Isse 'warm transfer' kehte hain. Yeh professional tarika hai jisse receiver ko call ke context ka pata hota hai aur caller ko apni baat dohrani nahi padti.

questions.question: Appointment schedule karte samay kya cheez confirm karna zaroori hai?

options.B: Sirf date

questions.explanation: Ek successful appointment ke liye date, time, location, aur meeting ka purpose, sabhi cheezein dono parties ke beech me clear honi chahiye.

questions.question: Ek courier delivery person aaya hai. Aapka agla kadam kya hoga?

options.B: Package receive karna, use check karna, aur receiving register me sign karna/karwana
options.D: Courier person se personal baatein karna

questions.explanation: Standard procedure hai ki aap delivery receive karein, agar zaroori ho to condition check karein, aur delivery log me entry karein.

questions.question: Agar koi aapse aisi information maangta hai jo confidential hai, to aap kya kahenge?

options.B: Unhe daant kar bhaga denge
options.C: Politely mana kar denge aur kahenge ki company policy ke anusaar aap yeh information share nahi kar sakte

questions.explanation: Confidentiality banaye rakhna ek office professional ki zimmedari hai. Politeness ke saath policy ka hawala dekar mana karna sahi tarika hai.

questions.question: Ek front office executive ki sabse mahatvapurna quality kya hai?

options.B: Excellent communication aur interpersonal skills

questions.explanation: Front office executive company ka pehla contact point hota hai, isliye unka communication aur logon se deal karne ka tarika behtareen hona chahiye.

questions.question: Aapke manager ne aapse 2 baje ki meeting ke liye conference room book karne ko kaha hai, lekin woh pehle se hi booked hai. Aap kya karenge?

options.A: Manager ko bol denge ki room available nahi hai aur chup ho jayenge
options.B: Manager ko problem batayenge aur saath me alternative solutions bhi denge (jaise dusra room ya dusra time slot)
options.C: Jisne room book kiya hai uski booking cancel kar denge
options.D: Meeting ko hi cancel kar denge

questions.explanation: Sirf problem batana kaafi nahi hai. Ek accha administrator problem ke saath-saath possible solutions bhi provide karta hai. Yeh proactiveness dikhata hai.

questions.question: 'Petty Cash' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Office me rakha hua bahut saara paisa
options.B: Chhote-mote office ke kharcho (jaise stationery, tea) ke liye rakha gaya thoda sa cash

questions.explanation: Petty cash ek small amount of cash hota hai jise office ke rozmarra ke chhote kharcho ke liye rakha jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Invoice' kaun jaari karta hai?

options.B: Bechne wala (Seller)

questions.explanation: Seller ya service provider apne customer ko invoice bhejta hai, jisme beche gaye saaman ya service ki detail aur payment ki maang hoti hai.

questions.question: Office ke liye kharide gaye samaan ka hisaab rakhne wale document ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Expense Report/Voucher

questions.explanation: Expense report ya voucher ek form hota hai jisme kiye gaye kharch ka poora byora (description, amount, date) likha jaata hai, aksar bill ke saath.

questions.question: Accounting me 'Debit' ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Paise ka jaana ya kharch hona

questions.explanation: Basic accounting me, jab koi kharch hota hai ya asset kam hota hai, to use debit kiya jaata hai. (Note: This is a simplified explanation for office admin level).

questions.question: Ek 'Purchase Order' (PO) kya hai?

options.A: Payment lene ke baad bheja gaya document
options.B: Buyer dwara seller ko bheja gaya ek official document jisme khareede jaane wale saaman ki list aur price hoti hai

questions.explanation: Purchase Order ek contract ki tarah kaam karta hai jo buyer issue karta hai. Iske basis par seller saaman supply karta hai aur fir invoice bhejta hai.

questions.question: Petty cash se kharch kiye gaye paiso ka record rakhne ke liye kya maintain kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Petty Cash Book/Register
options.D: Kuch nahi, yaad rakha jaata hai

questions.explanation: Petty cash book me har chhota kharch (date, reason, amount) record kiya jaata hai taaki hisaab me gadbadi na ho.

questions.question: Aapko vendors ke purane outstanding payments ko track karna hai. Aap kaun sa document check karenge?

options.B: Accounts Payable records

questions.explanation: Accounts Payable (A/P) us paise ko refer karta hai jo company ko apne suppliers ya vendors ko dena hai. Yahi se outstanding payments ka pata chalta hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Quotation' aur 'Invoice' me kya fark hai?

options.B: Quotation kaam se pehle price batane ke liye hota hai, Invoice kaam ke baad payment maangne ke liye hota hai
options.C: Invoice pehle aata hai, Quotation baad me
options.D: Quotation me tax nahi hota, Invoice me hota hai

questions.explanation: Quotation ek anumanit (estimated) cost hai jo customer ko di jaati hai. Invoice ek final bill hota hai jo kaam poora hone par issue kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Bank Reconciliation Statement kyu banaya jaata hai?

options.A: Company ka profit nikalne ke liye
options.B: Company ki cash book aur bank passbook ke balance ko match karne ke liye
options.C: Employee ki salary banane ke liye
options.D: Office ka rent dene ke liye

questions.explanation: Yeh ek process hai jisse cash book aur bank statement ke beech ke differences (jaise bank charges, un-cleared cheques) ka pata lagaya jaata hai aur unhe milaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Aapko office ke liye stationery kharidni hai. Iska process kya hoga?

options.B: Pehle zaroorat (requirement) assess karna, fir approval lena, aur fir kharidna

questions.explanation: Professional tarika yeh hai ki pehle dekha jaye ki kya-kya chahiye, fir manager se budget approve karwaya jaye, aur uske baad hi kharidari ki jaye.

questions.question: GST ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Goods and Services Tax

questions.explanation: GST (Goods and Services Tax) ek indirect tax hai jo Bharat me saaman aur services ki supply par lagta hai.

questions.question: Jab aap kisi kharch ke liye company se paisa wapas lete hain, to us process ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Reimbursement

questions.explanation: Reimbursement woh process hai jisme aap company ke kaam ke liye kiye gaye apne personal kharcho ka paisa, bill dikha kar, company se wapas lete hain.

questions.question: Ek 'Credit Note' kab issue kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Jab customer extra payment kar de
options.B: Jab customer khareeda hua saaman wapas kar de ya invoice me koi galti ho

questions.explanation: Credit note seller dwara issue kiya jaata hai jo batata hai ki buyer ko itne amount ka credit diya gaya hai. Yeh sales return ya invoice correction ke case me hota hai.

questions.question: Office ke budget ko track karne ka kya fayda hai?

options.B: Isse yeh sunishchit hota hai ki kharche plan ke mutabik ho rahe hain aur overspending nahi ho rahi hai

questions.explanation: Budget tracking se financial discipline bana rehta hai aur company ke resources ka sahi istemal hota hai.

questions.question: TDS ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Tax Deducted at Source

questions.explanation: TDS ka matlab hai ki income (jaise salary, commission) dene wala vyakti payment karne se pehle hi us par banne wala tax kaat leta hai aur sarkar ko jama kar deta hai.

questions.question: Ek invoice me kya-kya jaankari honi zaroori hai?

options.B: Seller aur buyer ka naam, address, GST number, invoice number, date, saaman/service ka description aur amount

questions.explanation: Ek valid invoice me yeh sabhi details honi chahiye taaki woh ek legal aur accounting document ke taur par maanya ho.

questions.question: Workplace me 'Punctuality' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Samay par office aana aur kaam shuru karna

questions.explanation: Punctuality ka matlab hai samay ka paaband hona. Yeh professionalism aur zimmedari ko darshata hai.

questions.question: Office ki confidential information (jaise client data, financial reports) ke saath aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Apne dosto ke saath share karna chahiye
options.B: Use gopniya (secret) rakhna chahiye aur kisi anadhikrit (unauthorized) vyakti ko nahi batana chahiye
options.C: Social media par post karna chahiye
options.D: Use apne personal computer par save karna chahiye

questions.explanation: Company ki gopniya jaankari ko surakshit rakhna har employee ki ethical zimmedari hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek accha team player kaun hota hai?

options.A: Jo hamesha akele kaam karna pasand karta hai
options.B: Jo dusro ki help karta hai, ideas share karta hai aur team ke goal ke liye kaam karta hai
options.C: Jo saara credit khud le leta hai
options.D: Jo dusro ki galtiyan nikalta rehta hai

questions.explanation: Teamwork me collaboration, communication, aur mutual respect bahut zaroori hai. Ek accha team player team ki safalta me yogdaan deta hai.

questions.question: Office me professional dress code follow karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Yeh ek professional image banata hai aur company ke culture ko represent karta hai
options.C: Isse aapko zyada salary milti hai
options.D: Yeh sirf managers ke liye hota hai

questions.explanation: Aapka pehnawa aapke professionalism ka hissa hai. Yeh aapki aur aapki company ki ek positive image banata hai.

questions.question: Time management ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Din bhar kaam karte rehna bina break liye
options.B: Apne samay ko plan karna aur tasks ko priority ke hisab se pura karna taaki productivity badhe

questions.explanation: Effective time management me tasks ko organize karna, deadlines set karna aur samay ka behtareen istemal karna shamil hai.

questions.question: Agar aapka kisi colleague ke saath conflict (matbhed) ho jaaye to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Usse baat karna band kar dena chahiye
options.B: Sabke samne usse jhagda karna chahiye
options.C: Shaanti se, akele me usse baat karke samasya ko suljhane ki koshish karni chahiye

questions.explanation: Professional tarika yeh hai ki aap aapas me communicate karke aapsi matbhed ko suljhayein. Agar zaroorat pade to manager ya HR ki madad lein.

questions.question: Office ke resources (jaise printer, paper, internet) ka istemal kaise karna chahiye?

options.B: Zimmedari se aur sirf office ke kaam ke liye
options.C: Jaise marzi waise, bina soche samjhe

questions.explanation: Company ke resources company ke kaam ke liye hote hain. Unka galat ya personal istemal karna unethical hai.

questions.question: Apne kaam me galti hone par aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Galti ka ilzaam kisi aur par daal dena chahiye
options.C: Apni galti ko स्वीकार karna chahiye aur use jald se jald theek karne ki koshish karni chahiye

questions.explanation: Galtiyan sabse hoti hain. Ek professional vyakti apni galti maanta hai, usse seekhta hai aur use sudharta hai. Yeh accountability (jawabdehi) ko darshata hai.

questions.question: Ek 'Proactive' employee kaun hota hai?

options.A: Jo sirf tabhi kaam karta hai jab use bola jaaye
options.B: Jo problem hone ka intezar karne ke bajaye pehle se hi use pehchan kar solution nikalta hai
options.C: Jo hamesha aadesh ka intezar karta hai
options.D: Jo bahut saari shikayatein karta hai

questions.explanation: Proactive hone ka matlab hai initiative lena aur future ki zarooraton ya samasyao ko pehle se hi anticipate karke uspar kaam karna.

questions.question: Work-life balance ka kya mahatva hai?

options.A: Iska koi mahatva nahi, sirf kaam karna chahiye
options.B: Yeh professional aur personal life ke beech ek swasth santulan banaye rakhne me madad karta hai, jisse stress kam hota hai
options.C: Iska matlab hai kaam se zyada personal life par dhyan dena
options.D: Yeh sirf senior employees ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Accha work-life balance banaye rakhne se employee ki overall well-being, job satisfaction aur productivity behtar hoti hai.

questions.question: Aap dekhte hain ki aapka ek co-worker company policy tod raha hai. Aapki pehli aur sabse ahem zimmedari kya hai?

options.A: Use ignore kar dena, kyunki yeh aapka kaam nahi hai
options.B: Sabhi ko uske baare me batana
options.C: Policy ke anusaar, iski jaankari apne supervisor ya HR department ko dena
options.D: Uske saath policy todne me shamil ho jaana

questions.explanation: Ek ethical employee hone ke naate, aapki zimmedari hai ki aap company ki policies ko banaye rakhne me madad karein. Iski सूचना sahi channel (Supervisor/HR) ke through dena professional tarika hai.

questions.question: Apne skills ko lagatar behtar banane ki aadat ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Continuous Learning ya Professional Development

questions.explanation: Apne career me aage badhne ke liye, naye skills seekhte rehna aur purane skills ko update karte rehna bahut zaroori hai. Ise hi continuous learning kehte hain.
